series_metadata.series_description: Operator Questionnaire for Annular Disposal Wells, Active/Inactive filed in county/permit # order. A) These questionnaires are in order by county and permit number. They were used at the inception of the UIC Section for information purposes regarding oil & gas wells using annular disposal.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Hard copy of active and inactive files are be destroyed on premises microfilming or scanned an electronic format.. ; Microform: Microfilm continually updated and maintained. ; Electronic: Electronic continually updated and maintained
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Wastepaper ; Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent
